title: Admin Guard
description: Admin Guard is a premium plugin that allows SMP members to ensure admins aren't abusing commands on their server. The plugin has a variety of anti admin-abuse features, including player & console command tracking, console login coordinates hider and more!
body:
# Admin Guard
A premium plugin to avoid admins abusing their permissions in your server, allowing all players of a server to view commands run from players and the console, with loads more features!

# Features
> Allows all users to view commands run by other **admins** / **players** or **console** that may be abusive to the server.

![Screenshot of In Game Command History](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/be6aae7f20f369fa27be1f595eb5fd848d6ebb97.png)

> Hides **login coordinates** and **player's IPs** on server join. Helps you protect your base locations from abusive admins.

![Console Screenshot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d464457c50d2fa709749b54128407dea3cd31f6d.png)

> Hides personal **messages** from being sent in the console, allowing your messages to stay private with you.
> View logs from players kicked by the server for flying.


# Commands
```
/abuse commands {player / console}
/abuse op
/abuse anticheat {player}
/abuse spy {player / console}
/abuse stats
/abuse help
```
